title: ROKR 3D Wooden Puzzles Luminous Globe 3D Wooden Model Kits to Build for Adults Brain Teaser Puzzles Bithday Gifts
features: 【Build Your Own Night Light Globe】You will have a blast putting together the globe consists of 180 pre-cut wooden pieces. Once assembled, you can light it up at night, appreciate its beauty and explore the world even in the dark.

【360 Degree Rotatable Mechanical Globe】The beautiful mechanical gear system allows you to rotate a knob that controls the rotatory direction of the globe. Rotate in a full 360 degree to appreciate Earth from all angles.

【Fun Project & Easy to Assemble】ROKR Luminous Globe Puzzle comes with everything you need to build. Following the illustrated English assembly instructions, you will be rewarded with a functional Globe.

【Great Gift & Nice Display】A huge unique hands-on gift for any DIY lovers or any occasion like Christmas, Father’s Day, Birthday, Back to School, Thanksgiving Day, etc. Attractive interior decor for your room and office.
【Lifelong Service】ROKR strives be the your most trusted wooden puzzle brand. We offers free replacement for broken or missing parts. Reach us anytime and get a response within several hours.
